labels.notes: Cathy 9:49 — chronic multisystem complex (headache, neuropathy, tremors, suspected asthma, Raynaud's). Dx 493 (asthma) is borderline — patient has multiple equally-prominent complaints; a single asthma dx undersells the visit's complexity. Procedure section is hallucinated: 'Injection administered previously in April' cites 'The injections that we did were less than ideal.' That's a HISTORICAL injection (PAST), not performed today — the SOAP-LLM stance filter should have flagged this PROPOSED/HISTORICAL not COMPLETED. Failure modes: SOAP-procedure-hallucination (historical-as-performed), dx-code-narrow-pick.
